compatibility_policy_required_lines: - Clinic resolution contract is mandatory across all connected repos:
- scope: patient and guest patient-facing apps only; Admin and Doc apps are excluded
- if location is enabled, resolve nearest clinic by clinic latitude/longitude
- if location is disabled or unavailable for patient flows, fallback to patient profile clinic
- doctor queries/lists must be filtered by resolved clinic
- guest flows must use location when available, else fallback to a single global default clinic
